name: extract_invoice_tax_breakdown
description: Extract per-jurisdiction tax rows from a single vendor invoice.

rows.description: One entry per visible per-jurisdiction tax row. Empty if the invoice has only a header-level tax line.

jurisdiction.description: Label as written on the invoice (e.g. 'CA State Sales Tax', 'VAT 20%').

rate.description: Tax rate as a percentage when explicitly stated. Null when only the amount is shown.

confidence.description: Self-reported per-row certainty. LOGGED, NEVER TRUSTED for triage.
